title: Chiseled Bricks
description: A mod that adds new Chiseled Brick variants that have mob faces on them, while retexturing some in-game chiseled bricks!
body:
# Chiseled Bricks

> **This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**

**have you ever noticed that the chiseled stone bricks DOESN'T have a mob face on it? or have you noticed that the mud brick doesn't have a chiseled variant? well those scary times are over, today now with the chiseled bricks mod we have:**

<details>
<summary>Blocks</summary>

- chiseled mudbricks (frog face)
- chiseled bricks (zombie)
- chiseled end stone bricks (enderman)
- chiseled purpur bricks (shulker)
- chiseled prismarine bricks (guardian)
- chiseled red nether bricks (blaze)

</details>
<details>
<summary>Retuxtered Blocks</summary>

- chiseled stone bricks (villager)
- chiseled deeplsate bricks (a better looking warden)
- chiseled quartz bricks (ghast)

</details>

![The Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/w5UPHwL.png)

> [My Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/@gmrDDSm-Pro)

> [My Twitter (X)](https://www.twitter.com/Samtb746121)

**Please remember that by downloading the mod and using it in your mod-packs, i will earn a bit of money. So thank you a lot for the support! it means a lot to me <3**
